creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: wen
Date: Thu Dec 25 13:35:25 UTC 2014
New revision: 375550
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/375550

Log:
  Dancer2::Plugin::Email provides an easy way of handling text or
  html email messages with or without attachments. Simply define
  how you wish to send the email in your application's YAML
  configuration file, then call the email keyword passing the
  necessary parameters.

  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Dancer2-Plugin-Email/

  PR:		196190
  Submitted by:	hvo.pm@xs4all.nl

Changes:
  head/mail/Makefile
  head/mail/p5-Dancer2-Plugin-Email/
  head/mail/p5-Dancer2-Plugin-Email/Makefile
  head/mail/p5-Dancer2-Plugin-Email/distinfo
  head/mail/p5-Dancer2-Plugin-Email/pkg-descr
  head/mail/p5-Dancer2-Plugin-Email/pkg-plist
